title: The Twisted Trees of the Crooked Forest

segments.text: These trees grow at a bizarre 90-degree angle.
The cause remains a mystery — still debated by scientists.
The forest was planted after World War I.
A strange yet beautiful natural wonder.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Crooked Forest, Pomerania — Poland. A forest of trees with a puzzling twist. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
